Bash(git -C /Users/jack/Software/scp_port/blitz3d-wasm commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(codegen\): fix entity parent chain walk bugs

Fix scratch global collision where emitEntPtrToScratch clobbered
scratchGlobal4Idx \(parentIdG\) with the table capacity, breaking
multi-level parenting. Now reads capG directly instead of caching it.

Fix Euler rotation order from pitch->yaw->roll to roll->pitch->yaw
to match Blitz3D''s YXZ convention \(Ry * Rx * Rz * v\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

to match Blitz3D convention. Prevents WASM-side position drift vs
Three.js renderer when entities move while pitched or rolled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
